top_significant_findings.summary: Hungary EU funds political accord signed May 28 — forward trigger fired one day early; formal upgrade +2.3 (47.7→50.0) lands at exact Functional midpoint; Sulyok constitutional confrontation held as boundary-watch context
US ICE detainee suicide investigation (AP May 27): 22-year high, 7 deaths vs typical 0-1, 50% population spike — formal downgrade -1.6 (25.0→23.4); EQU enters dimension-Critical for first time
Meta 8,000-layoff including integrity team — first PLATFORM-SAFETY-TEAM-LAYOFF dual-dimension event application; formal downgrade -1.6 (9.4→7.8); founder review encouraged on convention

anomalies: Three scored events in single normal-nightly cycle is above typical baseline (1-2); driven by forward-trigger fire + same-day AP investigation + scanner-flagged dual-dimension Meta event
Two methodology novel flags applied this cycle (NUCLEAR-THREAT-RHETORIC, PLATFORM-SAFETY-TEAM-LAYOFF) — both require founder review for formal protocol elevation
Three drift-warnings flagged (Colombia, Slovakia, Amazon) — recommend index export cycle reconciliation
Scanner staleness on multiple boundary-distance framings (Poland 0.2pt → actual 2.2pt; Colombia boundary direction inverted) — index data is most authoritative
